experience.title: Information Technology Instructor
experience.description: Manage student learning needs. Create Curriculum for IT Program. Manage two part time instructors. Teach three classes of twenty-two students each class per day. Manage open entry/open exit curriculum for all training in the program. Verify training outcome reports to maintain COE standards. Data metric analysis of student progress throughout the course. Answer questions of potential students and parents. Review and update training standards as needed.

experience.title: Help Desk Manager
experience.description: Manage incoming troubleshooting calls from four state agencies. Assisted help desk staff members in resolving customer requests with first call resolution. Create and specify computer standards for the Utah Dept. of Health. Trained fourteen help desk staff members on help desk phone client installation and usage.

experience.title: Media Designer
experience.description: Prepare training curriculum for preparedness trainings. Designed eighteen computer based training courses for the department of Health's management staff training over one hundred managers providing significant cost savings.

experience.title: Technical Support Specialist
experience.description: Provided advanced level technical support for department staff in computer repair and service. Inventory control for department of health hardware. Created Technology standards for division of Health systems improvement.
